debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_starts_in_1 :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.startsIn1Condition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
⊢ u ≠ v

failed_attempts:
(by
        intro h_uv
        have h_u_len : u.len = 1 := h_starts_in_1
        have h_v_no_vars : ∀ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isRight symbol := h_exhaustive
        have h_u_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isLeft symbol := by
          rw [← h_uv]
          simp_all
        cases h_u_has_var with
        | intro symbol h_symbol =>
          have h_symbol_right : Sum.isRight symbol := h_v_no_vars symbol (by rw [h_uv]; exact h_symbol)
          contradiction))

(by
        intro h_uv
        have h_len : u.len = v.len := by rw [h_uv]
        have h_exhaustive_v : ∀ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isRight symbol := h_exhaustive
        have h_u_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isLeft symbol := by
          have h_u_len_1 : u.len = 1 := h_starts_in_1
          have h_u_eq : u = [u.get ⟨0, by simp [h_u_len_1]⟩] := by
            apply Word.eq_of_length_eq_one
            exact h_u_len_1
          rw [h_u_eq]
          use u.get ⟨0, by simp [h_u_len_1]⟩
          simp
        obtain ⟨symbol, h_symbol_in_u, h_symbol_is_left⟩ := h_u_has_var
        have h_symbol_in_v : symbol ∈ v := by rw [h_uv]; exact h_symbol_in_u
        have h_symbol_is_right : Sum.isRight symbol := h_exhaustive_v symbol h_symbol_in_v
        contradiction))

(by
        intro h_uv
        have h_u_len : u.len = 1 := h_starts_in_1
        have h_v_no_vars : ∀ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isRight symbol := h_exhaustive
        have h_u_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isLeft symbol := by
          rw [← h_uv]
          simp_all
          cases u
          case nil => contradiction
          case cons x xs =>
            cases xs
            case nil =>
              left
              simp
            case cons y ys => contradiction
        obtain ⟨symbol, h_symbol_in_u, h_symbol_is_left⟩ := h_u_has_var
        have h_symbol_in_v : symbol ∈ v := by rw [h_uv]; exact h_symbol_in_u
        have h_symbol_is_right : Sum.isRight symbol := h_v_no_vars symbol h_symbol_in_v
        contradiction))

(by
        intro h_uv
        have h_len : u.len = v.len := by rw [h_uv]
        have h_v_no_vars : ∀ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isRight symbol := h_exhaustive
        have h_u_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isLeft symbol := by
          rw [← h_uv]
          exact fun symbol h => h_v_no_vars symbol h
        have h_u_no_vars : ∀ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isRight symbol := by
          intro symbol h
          apply h_v_no_vars symbol
          rw [h_uv]
          exact h
        cases' h_u_has_var with symbol h_symbol
        cases' h_symbol with h_left h_in_u
        have h_right : Sum.isRight symbol := h_u_no_vars symbol h_in_u
        contradiction))

(by
        intro h_eq
        have h_len : u.len = v.len := by rw [h_eq]
        have h_exhaustive_v : ∀ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isRight symbol := h_exhaustive
        have h_u_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isLeft symbol := by
          have h_u_len_one : u.len = 1 := h_starts_in_1
          rw [h_u_len_one] at h_len
          cases u with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons x xs =>
            cases xs with
            | nil =>
              use x
              simp
            | cons _ _ => contradiction
        obtain ⟨symbol, h_symbol_in_u, h_symbol_is_left⟩ := h_u_has_var
        have h_symbol_in_v : symbol ∈ v := by rw [h_eq]; exact h_symbol_in_u
        have h_symbol_is_right : Sum.isRight symbol := h_exhaustive_v symbol h_symbol_in_v
        contradiction))

(by
        intro h_uv
        have h_u_len : u.len = 1 := h_starts_in_1
        have h_v_no_vars : ∀ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isRight symbol := h_exhaustive
        have h_u_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isLeft symbol := by

        have h_v_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isLeft symbol := by

        obtain ⟨symbol', h_mem', h_left'⟩ := h_v_has_var
        exact h_v_no_vars symbol' h_mem' h_left')

        have h_u_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isLeft symbol := by

        have h_v_no_vars : ∀ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isRight symbol := h_exhaustive
        have h_u_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isLeft symbol := by
